description: CompositionReversible running shorts in red and black, made of 100% polyester, has an elasticated waistband with a drawstring, has black panels on one side and red panels on the other side, an outer mesh and swoosh logo in a reflective material towards the left hemline Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold with like colours Do not bleach, iron or dry clean Line dry Built with the breathability and zero-distraction fit that athletes demand, this pair of nike running shorts comes in a simple design. These high-performance shorts can be fully reversed for the versatility of two garments in one. Team it with tees and running shoes.
